creator: w.schwarzenfeld@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 167526
svn-diff_www_mitmproxy-0.15

Update www/mitmproxy to 0.15.

ChangeLog
4 December 2015: mitmproxy 0.15
    * Support for loading and converting older dumpfile formats (0.13 and up)
    * Content views for inline script (@chrisczub)
    * Better handling of empty header values (Benjamin Lee/@bltb)
    * Fix a gnarly memory leak in mitmdump
    * A number of bugfixes and s

further changes since 0.10:
https://github.com/mitmproxy/mitmproxy/blob/master/CHANGELOG#L26

portlint OK.
